name: it-tools
tagline: A self-hosted collection of handy web tools for developers and sysadmins
description: IT Tools is a collection of handy web tools for developers and system administrators, such as encoders, hashers, JWT decoders and network utilities. It can be self hosted as an all in one Swiss army knife for everyday tasks.

features.title: Developer Utility Collection
features.description: Provides a collection of common tools used in development workflows

features.title: Text and Encoding Tools
features.description: Converts text between formats encodings and representations

features.title: JSON and YAML Utilities
features.description: Formats validates and transforms structured data

features.title: Web Interface
features.description: Uses tools directly in a browser

features.title: Open Source Transparency
features.description: Makes all tool logic publicly inspectable

features.title: Self-Hosted Tool Collection
features.description: Runs the tools on your own servers
